title: ceanothus divergens var. occidentalis
intro: Ceanothus divergens var. occidentalis, also known as California lilac, is a shrub native to the western coastal regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ceanothus divergens var. occidentalis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
